name: Hermits
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream margarine and brown sugar together until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs and mix for 1 minute, scraping the bowl before and after adding eggs.
3. Stir flour, baking powder, salt, sugar substitute, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, walnuts, and raisins together to blend well.
4. Mix in water with the creamy mixture until blended.
5. Drop dough by 1 1/2 tablespoons onto ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until cookies are browned on the bottom.
7. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
Food exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE & 1 FAT EXCHANGE
Calories: 114, Fat: 5g, Carbohydrates: 15g, Sodium: 89, Protein: 2g, Cholesterol: 23 mg
